items.title: Microsoft’s Emissions Surged 25% in 2025 During Data Center Boom
items.summary: (Bloomberg) -- Microsoft Corp. said its carbon emissions climbed 25% in 2025, making it the latest technology company to report a setback in its efforts to erase emissions amid heavy spending on artificial intelligence data centers. items.title: Netflix Vs. Comcast: Buy Netflix For This Reason
